concerns.analysis: A significant section from Page 3 of the source document is entirely missing from the output. The boxed content providing information and links for 'SANS awareness videos and webcasts' (including two specific URLs) was omitted in the conversion process. While the accompanying image is mentioned in the elements list (reading_order 34), the associated text and functional links are absent.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The SANS Institute also provides free awareness videos and webcasts. The SANS Video of the Month may be accessed via the following link: https://www.sans.org/security-awareness-training/video-month The SANS Institute free webcasts may be accessed via the following link: https://www.sans.org/webcasts/upcoming.
concerns.output_quote: Entire text block and URLs missing.

concerns.analysis: Several lists throughout the document have been incorrectly converted into single paragraph blocks containing the text of all list items separated by newline characters. This merges distinct list items into a single structural element, which is a failure of list structure.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The PDF contains multiple bulleted and check-marked lists (e.g., Page 1: Natural disasters..., Page 2: US-CERT tips, Page 3: KEY FEATURES).
concerns.output_quote: The output renders these lists as single paragraphs: Element 8 ('• Natural disasters (e.g., Hurricane Florence or Matthew)\n• Epidemics...'), Element 15 ('* Be suspicious...'), Element 19 ('* **Fake Charity Websites...'), Element 30 ('✓ Access 24/7...').
concerns.location: Sections 'Don't Take the Bait!', 'How can you avoid being a victim?', 'Avoid Holiday Scams', and 'KEY FEATURES:'.

concerns.analysis: Most links identified in the OCR and PDF are present in the output. However, one specific link in the FEMA section on page 3 is missing its hyperlink structure in the output.
concerns.output_quote: For more information and a list of the upcoming sessions, please view the training bulletin. (Element 32)
concerns.location: Page 3, section 'FEMA Emergency Management Institute Weekly EMI e-Forums'
